summary: The chapter opens with the announcement of the 'Essence of the Strait: Guild Experience,' a crucial event where heroes will select cadets, prioritizing those with top rankings. Cadet Kim Hajin, recognized as '1st in theory' and possessing a unique 'Observation and Reading' ability, is brought to an analysis room. He encounters fellow hero Lee Jin-ah and the Vice-Captain, as the narrative foreshadows future conflicts involving Yeon-Ha and hints at a tragic past for Hajin linked to a past massacre.
key_moments: The 'Essence of the Strait: Guild Experience' is announced, detailing how heroes will select top-ranked cadets.
Cadet Kim Hajin, noted for his '1st in theory' ranking and special 'Observation and Reading' ability, is introduced to an analysis room.
Hajin meets Lee Jin-ah and the Vice-Captain, while his traumatic past, including a massacre at a shelter, is revealed.
characters_present: Vice-Captain of Essence of the Strait
